videos.headline: Fernando Mendoza walks it in for Indiana's first TD
videos.description: Fernando Mendoza rushes 7 yards for a Hoosiers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Fernando Mendoza walks it in for Indiana's first TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Omar Cooper Jr. fools Maryland's defense for a Hoosiers TD
videos.description: Fernando Mendoza finds Omar Cooper Jr. for a 22-yard Indiana touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Omar Cooper Jr. fools Maryland's defense for a Hoosiers TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devan Boykin strips ball from Maryland and takes it to the house
videos.description: Devan Boykin forces a fumble and returns it for another Hoosiers touchdown.

videos.headline: Jonathan Brady extends Indiana's lead
